summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of Oryno multi-service booking platform after Phase 5 migration completion. Tested authentication flows, RBAC, service pages, admin functionality, and static pages. Backend APIs 92.9% success rate, frontend functionality excellent across all tested features.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 403 'Not authenticated' when accessing customer orders with valid token
flaky_endpoints.impact: Customers cannot view their order history

passed_tests: Frontend application loads successfully at public URL
Login page shows correct two-option interface ('Login to Your Account' and 'Create New Account')
Authentication flow works for all roles (admin@test.com, operator@test.com, customer@test.com)
Dashboard loads with proper stats, Quick Actions, and role-specific content
Currency formatting correctly displays 'X,XXX FCFA' format throughout application
Services dropdown navigation works with all 9 services (Hotels, Restaurants, Travel, Car Rental, Events, Packages, Laundry, Cinema, Banquet)
Car Rental Results page displays 8 mock vehicles correctly (recently fixed bug verified)
Packages Results page displays 8 mock travel packages with proper categories and pricing
RBAC working correctly - admin can access User Management and Commission pages
RBAC protection working - customers get 'Access Denied' when accessing admin pages
Management section accessible for admin/operator roles with proper navigation
Admin pages show proper data (User Management shows 4 users: 1 Admin, 1 Operator, 2 Customers)
Commission Management page loads with 13% default rate configuration
Static pages load correctly (Help Center with FAQ, Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions, Contact Us)
Contact page shows proper office locations (Yaoundé headquarters, Douala branch)
Logout functionality works correctly
Role-based sidebar navigation shows appropriate options for each user type
Mock data fallback implemented correctly for all service pages
Filters and sorting work on results pages (Vehicle Type, Transmission, Fuel Type, Price Range)
Featured badges and discount percentages display correctly on packages
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix orders endpoint authentication issue - customers with valid tokens are getting 403 'Not authenticated' error when trying to access /api/orders
